title: Is the Grinch Stealing This Year's Holiday Season Jobs?
text: United Parcel Service Inc. NYSE: UPS is among logistics companies that are proceeding cautiously this year, in anticipation of a slower holiday season.

title: 3 Transport-Service Stocks to Watch Despite Industry Concerns
text: The Zacks Industry Rank for the Transportation-Services industry paints a dull picture mainly due to the freight demand slowdown. We believe stocks like EXPD, CHRW and MATX are better positioned to escape industry challenges.

title: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Grows Border Footprint in Laredo,TX
text: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) has opened a 400,000 square-foot cross-border facility in Laredo, TX.

title: C.H. Robinson Opens One of the Largest Cross-border Logistics Facilities in Dominant U.S. Trade Hub of Laredo
text: LAREDO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #freight--To serve the nearshoring boom in Mexico, C.H. Robinson has opened the largest logistics facility of its kind at the No. 1 border crossing.

title: C.H. Robinson: Navigating Challenges And Opportunities
text: C.H. Robinson is a third-party logistics company that connects people who need things moved with transportation providers. CHRW's weakened earnings outlook can be primarily attributed to the challenging conditions in global freight markets. These conditions include weak demand, high inventories, and excess capacity. The company's new CEO, Dave Bozeman, brings significant industry experience and is expected to navigate these challenges.

title: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Gains From Dividends Amid Freight Woes
text: C.H. Robinson's (CHRW) measures to reward its shareholders are encouraging. However, softness in freight demand hurts.

title: Why Is C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Down 7.9% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
